title: croton chimboracensis
intro: Croton chimboracensis, also known as Resin Tree or Sangre de Drago, is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America, characterized by its unique, red sap. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Croton chimboracensis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by extracting its resin, which is then used to make tinctures, salves, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
